src_raw: 2022年伊始，全球經濟環境一片暗淡。新冠病毒變異株Omicron肆虐，令全球經濟增長繼續受壓，通脹壓力亦持續上升。其後俄羅斯與烏克蘭爆發衝突，進一步推高通脹壓力，導致各主要央行採取前置式貨幣緊縮政策，擴大環球金融市場的波動，並加劇經濟增長放緩的風險。本地方面，第五波疫情爆發，感染個案急速上升，亦進一步打擊經濟。同時，圍繞防疫措施與檢疫限制的負面報道，更令外界對香港產生誤解，威脅香港作為國際金融中心的聲譽。全年計，香港實質本地生產總值收縮了3.5%。
mt_raw: The global economic outlook was bleak at the start of 2022. The Omicron variant of COVID-19 raged across the world, continuing to weigh on global economic growth and fuelling inflationary pressures. The conflict between Russia and Ukraine then broke out, further pushing up inflation and prompting major central banks to adopt a front-loaded monetary tightening policy. This amplified volatility in global financial markets and exacerbated the risk of a slowdown in economic growth. Locally, the fifth wave of the pandemic saw a rapid rise in infections, further damaging the economy. Meanwhile, negative reports about anti-epidemic measures and quarantine restrictions led to misunderstandings about Hong Kong in the outside world, threatening the city’s reputation as an international financial centre. Overall, Hong Kong’s real GDP contracted by 3.5% for the year.

terms: {'國際金融領袖投資峰會': 'Global Financial Leaders’ Investment Summit'}
src_raw: 儘管面對重重挑戰，金管局繼續致力保障香港貨幣與金融穩定，並於主要策略範疇推進多項有利發展的措施，進一步鞏固香港的國際金融中心地位。經歷3年的旅遊限制後，我們成功向國際社會展示香港已全面復常，旅客亦能再次親身訪港體驗。金管局在去年11月舉辦「國際金融領袖投資峰會」，來自世界各地的金融領袖親身來港出席。外界如此熱烈的反應，成為印證香港全面復常最好不過的證明。
mt_raw: Despite facing numerous challenges, the HKMA continued to work hard to safeguard Hong Kong’s monetary and financial stability and implemented a number of measures conducive to development in key strategic areas, further consolidating Hong Kong’s position as an international financial centre. After three years of travel restrictions, we successfully demonstrated to the international community that Hong Kong has fully returned to normalcy, and visitors can once again experience the city in person. In November last year, the HKMA hosted the International Financial Leaders’ Investment Summit, which was attended in person by financial leaders from around the world. The enthusiastic response from the outside world was the best proof that Hong Kong has fully returned to normalcy.

src_raw: 展望未來，外圍環境仍然充滿前所未有的不確定性。儘管如此，內地經濟重啟會為香港以至整個地區重新注入動力。金管局將繼續緊守崗位，履行維持香港貨幣與銀行體系穩定的職能，並積極尋求更多有利香港發展的機會，展現及提升香港作為國際金融中心的競爭力。我們亦會繼續為提升全球氣候應變能力及可持續發展出力。今年除《二零二二年年報》外，我們會另外發表《二零二二年可持續發展報告》，以便更詳細地介紹金管局在提升香港作為綠色和可持續金融樞紐的地位所進行的各項工作，以及金管局作為負責任投資者及可持續機構所作出的努力。
mt_raw: Looking ahead, the external environment remains fraught with unprecedented uncertainties. Nevertheless, the reopening of the Mainland economy will reinvigorate Hong Kong and the region as a whole. The HKMA will continue to perform its duties to maintain the stability of Hong Kong’s monetary and banking systems, actively seek more opportunities that are conducive to Hong Kong’s development, and demonstrate and enhance Hong Kong’s competitiveness as an international financial centre. We will also continue to contribute to enhancing global climate resilience and sustainable development. In addition to the 2022 Annual Report, we will publish a separate 2022 Sustainability Report this year to provide more details on the HKMA’s work in enhancing Hong Kong’s position as a green and sustainable financial hub, as well as the HKMA’s efforts as a responsible investor and sustainable institution.

terms: {'匯率': 'exchange value', '港元': 'HKD', '美國聯邦儲備局': 'US Federal Reserve', '聯儲局': 'Fed', '聯匯制度': 'LERS', '聯邦儲備局': 'Federal Reserve'}
src_raw: 聯繫匯率制度（聯匯制度）自1983年實施至今，歷經多個經濟周期，成功抵禦各種各樣的外來衝擊。2022年再次見證聯匯制度的抗震能力。在美國聯邦儲備局（聯儲局）大幅收緊貨幣政策下，弱方兌換保證於2022年5月至11月期間被觸發41次，金管局按照既定機制，以有序及具透明度的方式從市場買入合共2,421億港元。其間港元匯率及貨幣市場繼續運作暢順，反映聯匯制度穩健有效。
mt_raw: The Linked Exchange Rate System (LERS) has been in operation since 1983 and has successfully withstood various external shocks over several economic cycles. 2022 once again demonstrated the resilience of the LERS. As the US Federal Reserve tightened its monetary policy significantly, the weak-side Convertibility Undertaking was triggered 41 times between May and November 2022. The HKMA followed the established mechanism and bought a total of HK$242.1 billion from the market in an orderly and transparent manner. During this period, the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate and the monetary market continued to operate smoothly, reflecting the robustness and effectiveness of the LERS.

terms: {'國際貨幣基金組織': 'International Monetary Fund', '基金組織': 'IMF', '對外部門報告': 'External Sector Report', '聯匯制度': 'LERS'}
src_raw: 這份對聯匯制度的信心，來自於建立多年的穩固根基。正如國際貨幣基金組織在其《2022年對外部門報告》中重申，聯匯制度的公信力建基於多項因素，包括具高透明度的運作規則、充裕的外匯儲備、審慎的財政制度、穩健的金融監管，以及靈活的經濟結構。
mt_raw: This confidence in the LERS stems from the solid foundation built over many years. As reiterated by the International Monetary Fund in its 2022 External Sector Report, the credibility of the LERS is based on a number of factors, including highly transparent operating rules, ample foreign exchange reserves, a prudent fiscal system, robust financial supervision, and a flexible economic structure.

src_raw: 我們深信除了穩健的機制外，致力與公眾及市場溝通以加深其對聯匯制度的了解、進行有效的市場監察，以及就不同情景作出應變計劃，均有助鞏固各界對聯匯制度的信心。我們就聯匯制度運作機制推出的社交媒體宣傳活動，有助在年內弱方兌換保證多次被觸發的情況下，有效維護市場對聯匯制度的信心。內部方面，金管局亦善用數據分析技術加強市場監察，讓我們能適時回應最新市場形勢。
mt_raw: In addition to a robust mechanism, we believe that efforts to communicate with the public and the market to deepen their understanding of the LERS, effective market monitoring, and contingency planning for different scenarios will help consolidate confidence in the LERS across all sectors. Our social media campaign on the operation of the LERS helped maintain market confidence in the system during a year when the weak-side Convertibility Undertaking was triggered multiple times. Internally, the HKMA also made good use of data analytics technology to enhance market monitoring, enabling us to respond to the latest market developments in a timely manner.

terms: {'法定最低要求': 'statutory minimum requirements', '流動性': 'liquidity positions', '特定分類貸款比率': 'classified loan ratio', '資本充足': 'capital adequacy', '資本充足比率': 'capital ratio', '資產質素': 'asset quality'}
src_raw: 年內，儘管面對宏觀層面的挑戰以及遞增的信用風險，香港銀行體系仍然維持穩健，資本及流動性均非常充裕。2022年底，本地銀行的綜合總資本充足比率為20.1%，遠高於國際最低要求的8%。2022年第4季，大型銀行的流動性覆蓋比率稍升至162.3%，亦遠高於法定最低要求的100%。鑑於信貸環境面對挑戰，銀行體系的資產質素略為轉差，特定分類貸款比率於2022年底升至1.38%，但有關水平仍屬穩健，並低於2000年以來的長期平均水平1.8%。
mt_raw: During the year, despite facing macroeconomic challenges and increasing credit risks, Hong Kong’s banking system remained robust, with ample capital and liquidity. At the end of 2022, the consolidated total capital adequacy ratio of local banks was 20.1%, well above the international minimum requirement of 8%. In the fourth quarter of 2022, the liquidity coverage ratio of large banks edged up slightly to 162.3%, also well above the statutory minimum requirement of 100%. Given the challenging credit environment, the asset quality of the banking system deteriorated slightly, with the ratio of classified loans rising to 1.38% at the end of 2022. However, this level remains sound and is below the long-term average of 1.8% since 2000.

src_raw: 過去一年面對的一項主要監管挑戰，是在第五波新冠疫情後經濟仍充滿不確定性之下，確保銀行繼續為客戶提供所需支援的同時，維持穩健的信用風險管理。「預先批核還息不還本」計劃進一步展期，並加入自願性部分本金還款選項，讓借款人可以選擇開始償還部分本金，協助客戶就最終回復正常還款作好準備。
mt_raw: One of the major supervisory challenges faced last year was to ensure that banks continued to provide the necessary support to customers while maintaining sound credit risk management in an environment of economic uncertainty following the fifth wave of COVID-19. The “pre-approved principal payment holiday scheme” was further extended, with a voluntary partial principal repayment option added, allowing borrowers to choose to start repaying part of the principal to help customers prepare for an eventual return to normal repayments.

terms: {'壓力測試': 'Stress-testing', '年金': 'annuity', '承擔': 'Commitments', '流動性': 'liquidity positions'}
src_raw: 因應主要經濟體大幅收緊貨幣政策令市場波動加劇，2022年金管局另一項主要監管工作是加強監察銀行的市場及流動性風險承擔。我們深入評估各經濟體同步收緊貨幣政策對銀行可能產生的影響，並就壓力測試引入新情景，以評估銀行應對長時間流動性壓力的韌性。
mt_raw: In response to heightened market volatility caused by major economies’ aggressive monetary tightening, another key supervisory task of the HKMA in 2022 was to strengthen the monitoring of banks’ market and liquidity risk exposures. We conducted in-depth assessments of the potential impact of synchronised monetary tightening across economies on banks and introduced new scenarios for stress testing to assess banks’ resilience to prolonged liquidity pressures.

terms: {'監管指引': 'supervisory guidance', '運作穩健': 'operational resilience', '運作穩健性': 'operational resilience', '運作穩健性及網絡防衛能力': 'operational and cyber resilience'}
src_raw: 與此同時，我們繼續採取具前瞻性的措施，促進在多個範疇的有效風險管理。在運作穩健性及網絡防衛能力方面，我們提供指引協助銀行制定綜合及全面的運作架構，以達致穩健經營，並就銀行具體的運作範疇提供詳盡監管指引，例如因應雲端技術普及而就使用雲端運算提供指引。此外，因應數碼化加速發展，我們亦加強了應對「網絡釣魚」騙案和推進消費者及投資者保障的工作。
mt_raw: At the same time, we continued to take forward-looking measures to promote effective risk management in various areas. In terms of operational resilience and cyber defence capabilities, we provided guidance to help banks establish a comprehensive and holistic operational framework to achieve sound operations, and issued detailed supervisory guidance on specific operational areas of banks, such as guidance on the use of cloud computing in response to the widespread adoption of cloud technology. In addition, in response to the accelerated development of digitalisation, we strengthened our efforts to combat “phishing” scams and enhance consumer and investor protection.

terms: {'內地銀行戶口': 'Mainland accounts', '分行及自助銀行服務設施': 'branch and self-service facilities'}
src_raw: 除了維持銀行體系穩健外，金管局亦致力推動普及金融及提高銀行服務的便利性。銀行對於金管局就提供基本銀行服務的呼籲反應正面，有銀行在新發展地區的大型公共屋邨增設分行及自助銀行服務設施。受到疫情相關的旅遊限制影響，許多香港市民無法使用其內地銀行戶口。有見及此，金管局與有關各方緊密合作，協助重新啓動約50萬個內地銀行戶口，受影響戶口持有人無需親身前往內地辦理。
mt_raw: In addition to maintaining the soundness of the banking system, the HKMA is also committed to promoting financial inclusion and enhancing the accessibility of banking services. Banks responded positively to the HKMA’s call to provide basic banking services, with some banks setting up branches and self-service banking facilities in large public housing estates in new development areas. Due to travel restrictions related to the pandemic, many Hong Kong citizens were unable to use their Mainland bank accounts. In response, the HKMA worked closely with relevant parties to help reactivate around 500,000 Mainland bank accounts, without the need for the affected account holders to travel to the Mainland in person.

src_raw: 另一個對銀行業持續發展具策略重要性的範疇是提升專業能力。為擴展業務，銀行業對專業人才的需求仍然龐大。金管局在其人才發展策略 — 「連接人才與未來」— 的基礎上，在過去一年推出多項措施，協助銀行業吸引、培育及挽留人才，集中提升及再培訓現有從業員的技能，以及培育年輕一代，以建立可持續的人才庫。
mt_raw: Another area of strategic importance for the continued development of the banking industry is the enhancement of professional capabilities. The banking industry still has a large demand for professional talent to expand its business. Building on its talent development strategy – “Connecting Talent with the Future” – the HKMA launched a number of initiatives last year to help the banking industry attract, nurture and retain talent, focusing on upgrading and retraining the skills of existing employees and cultivating the younger generation to build a sustainable talent pool.

terms: {'8號颱風訊號': 'No. 8 typhoon signal', '國際金融領袖投資峰會': 'Global Financial Leaders’ Investment Summit'}
src_raw: 實施多時的疫情相關旅遊限制於2022年逐步撤銷，我們作出了多方面的努力讓香港重回國際舞台。11月舉行的「國際金融領袖投資峰會」吸引超過200位來自環球金融機構的國際及地區負責人親臨香港，並獲得全球各地的關注及熱切迴響。儘管峰會舉行日期不巧遇上50年來首個在11月份發出的8號颱風訊號，峰會仍然十分成功，向世界傳遞了香港已全面復常並正展現無比朝氣與活力的有力訊息。我們很高興看到峰會產生了正面的漣漪效應，不少環球金融機構及國際組織現正或計劃在香港舉辦各類活動。
mt_raw: After the prolonged pandemic-related travel restrictions were gradually lifted in 2022, we made efforts on various fronts to bring Hong Kong back to the international stage. The International Financial Leaders’ Investment Summit held in November attracted over 200 international and regional heads of global financial institutions to Hong Kong in person, and received attention and enthusiastic responses from around the world. Despite the Summit’s date coinciding with the first No. 8 typhoon signal issued in November in 50 years, it was still a great success, sending a powerful message to the world that Hong Kong has fully returned to normalcy and is demonstrating tremendous vitality and energy. We are pleased to see that the Summit has generated positive ripple effects, with many global financial institutions and international organisations now hosting or planning various events in Hong Kong.

src_raw: 最後，我們在擁抱金融創新和它帶來的好處的同時，亦明白有必要監察及處理好相關發展可能帶來的風險。我們正密切注視虛擬資產領域的發展，並參與相關監管事宜的國際討論。經考慮公眾諮詢收集到的意見及相關國際標準後，我們將採納「相同風險，相同監管」1 的方式制定穩定幣的監管制度及界定其監管範圍。未來我們率先規管的對象將是那些標榜與一種或以上法定貨幣的價值掛鈎的穩定幣，因為這類穩定幣可能對貨幣及金融穩定帶來更高及更迫切的潛在風險。我們相信在訂立適當的規範下，業界將可更安全穩妥地開拓數碼金融的潛力。
mt_raw: Finally, while embracing financial innovation and its benefits, we also understand the need to monitor and manage the risks that such developments may bring. We are closely monitoring developments in the virtual asset sector and participating in international discussions on related regulatory matters. After considering the views collected from the public consultation and relevant international standards, we will adopt a “same risk, same regulation” approach to formulate a regulatory regime for stablecoins and define its regulatory scope. In the future, we will first regulate those stablecoins that claim to peg their value to one or more fiat currencies, as they may pose higher and more urgent potential risks to monetary and financial stability. We believe that with appropriate rules in place, the industry will be able to unlock the potential of digital finance in a safer and more secure manner.

terms: {'去全球化': 'de-globalisation', '歐洲': 'Europe', '金融市場': 'financial markets'}
src_raw: 儘管香港經濟在2023 年初出現復甦跡象，但外圍環境仍然充滿挑戰及不確定性。近期美國和歐洲的銀行業受壓，個別美國本土銀行在2023 年3 月倒閉，對環球金融市場造成漣漪效應，而主要央行收緊貨幣政策，很有可能令2023 年全球經濟增長放緩甚或衰退。另一方面，地緣政治局勢緊張，以及去全球化的威脅持續，可能會繼續拖累全球貿易，並會令環球金融市場不時出現波動。儘管如此，香港金融體系憑藉多年來所建立穩健的抗震能力及充裕的緩衝，有足夠能力抵禦不利衝擊。
mt_raw: Although the Hong Kong economy showed signs of recovery at the beginning of 2023, the external environment remains challenging and uncertain. Recently, the banking sectors in the United States and Europe have come under pressure, with some US banks collapsing in March 2023, creating a ripple effect across global financial markets. Additionally, major central banks’ tightening of monetary policy is likely to slow or even reverse global economic growth in 2023. Meanwhile, geopolitical tensions and the threat of deglobalisation persist, which could continue to weigh on global trade and cause volatility in international financial markets. Nevertheless, Hong Kong’s financial system has built robust resilience and ample buffers over the years, enabling it to withstand adverse shocks.

src_raw: 金管局非常重視保障貨幣及金融穩定。展望未來，面對不明朗的宏觀經濟環境，金管局會保持警惕，力求迅速辨識正浮現的風險，並靈活應對。與此同時，金管局會繼續把握機遇及創造政策空間，進一步提升香港作為主要國際金融中心的地位。面對充滿挑戰的投資環境，金管局在管理外匯基金時會繼續審慎投資，同時保持足夠靈活性，按需要採取防禦措施，並維持高流動性。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) places great emphasis on safeguarding monetary and financial stability. Looking ahead, in the face of an uncertain macroeconomic environment, the HKMA will remain vigilant, strive to swiftly identify emerging risks, and respond flexibly. At the same time, the HKMA will continue to seize opportunities and create policy space to further enhance Hong Kong’s position as a leading international financial centre. In a challenging investment environment, the HKMA will continue to invest prudently in managing the Exchange Fund, while maintaining sufficient flexibility to take defensive measures as needed and preserve high liquidity.

mt_raw: In 2023, uncertainties surrounding the future path of US interest rates and pressures within the banking systems of advanced economies could pose downside risks to growth prospects in major advanced economies. Furthermore, persistent geopolitical risks could continue to weigh on global trade and cause volatility in international financial markets. However, Hong Kong’s financial system has built robust resilience and buffers over the years, enabling it to withstand adverse shocks. The HKMA also has the capacity, resources and determination to maintain Hong Kong’s monetary and financial stability.

src_raw: 隨着銀行在業務營運中更廣泛應用科技，金管局會致力提升銀行業的運作穩健性及網絡防衛能力。繼5月發出《監管政策手冊》新單元「運作穩健性」後，金管局會與業界保持緊密聯繫，審視認可機構在制定運作穩健性框架方面的進度。同時，金管局將透過跟進認可機構在「網絡防衛評估框架2.0」評估下發現的問題以及檢視認可機構實施穩固三重數據備份的進展，提高銀行業的網絡防衛能力。
mt_raw: As banks increasingly apply technology in their operations, the HKMA will strive to enhance the operational robustness and cyber defence capabilities of the banking sector. Following the issuance of a new module on “Operational Resilience” in the Regulatory Policy Handbook in May, the HKMA will maintain close contact with the industry to review authorised institutions’ progress in developing operational resilience frameworks. At the same time, the HKMA will enhance the banking sector’s cyber defence capabilities by following up on issues identified by authorised institutions under the “Cyber Resilience Assessment Framework 2.0” and reviewing their progress in implementing robust triple data backups.

src_raw: 在2023年，金管局的工作重點包括更新監管資訊、加強打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集（反洗錢）生態系統各持份者的合作以應對洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集（洗錢）風險，以及進一步推動反洗錢監管科技與合規科技的發展。金管局的《打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集指引》亦會作出修訂，並會就「政治人物」採取與風險相稱的措施發出具體指引，從而促進業界以有效及風險為本的方法落實法例的主要修訂。與此同時，金管局會擴大現有公私營夥伴合作的涵蓋範圍以加強訊息共享，以及支持推出銀行之間的訊息共享平台，藉以加快偵測可疑戶口及防範戶口被濫用，並加強對騙案受害人的保障和協助受害人追討損失。金管局亦會透過「反洗錢合規科技實驗室」及其他反洗錢合規科技項目，進一步集中推動採用合規科技（包括數據分析），並致力發展宏觀分析能力，以配合其數據為本的反洗錢監管工作。透過實施上述各項措施，金管局將能更迅速針對傀儡戶口網絡等系統性洗錢風險採取相應措施，以及靈活應對不斷轉變的威脅。
mt_raw: In 2023, the HKMA’s priorities will include updating regulatory information, strengthening cooperation among stakeholders in the anti-money laundering and counter-terrorist financing (AML/CFT) ecosystem to address money laundering and terrorist financing risks, and further promoting the development of AML regulatory technology and compliance technology. The HKMA’s *Guidelines on Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Terrorist Financing* will also be revised, and specific guidance will be issued on taking measures proportionate to the risk posed by "politically exposed persons", thereby facilitating the industry’s implementation of key legislative amendments in an effective and risk-based manner. At the same time, the HKMA will expand the scope of existing public-private partnerships to enhance information sharing and support the launch of an interbank information-sharing platform to expedite the detection of suspicious accounts and prevent account misuse, as well as strengthen protection for scam victims and assist them in recovering losses. The HKMA will also further promote the adoption of compliance technology (including data analytics) through the "AML Compliance Technology Lab" and other AML compliance technology projects, and will strive to develop macro-analysis capabilities to support its data-based AML regulatory work. By implementing these measures, the HKMA will be able to respond more swiftly to systemic money laundering risks such as puppet account networks and to adapt flexibly to evolving threats.

src_raw: 金管局在2023年會加強有關認可機構在財富管理以及銷售證券、強制性公積金（強積金）與其他投資及保險產品方面的操守的現場審查及非現場監察。2023年的重點將會是「跨境理財通」計劃、數碼分銷及諮詢平台、虛擬資產、環境、社會及管治(ESG)投資產品及長期保險產品。金管局在有關過程中會參考市場最新發展及國際標準的修訂。
mt_raw: In 2023, the HKMA will strengthen on-site inspections and off-site monitoring of authorised institutions’ conduct in wealth management and the sale of securities, Mandatory Provident Fund (MPF) products and other investment and insurance products. The focus in 2023 will be on the Cross-boundary Wealth Management Connect scheme, digital distribution and advisory platforms, virtual assets, environmental, social and governance (ESG) investment products, and long-term insurance products. In this process, the HKMA will refer to the latest market developments and revisions to international standards.

src_raw: 金管局的目標是按照《支付系統及儲值支付工具條例》（《支付條例》）、《金融市場基建的原則》（《基建原則》），以及支付及金融基建委員會發出的各項指引促進其所監察的金融市場基建的安全及效率，按需要參照最新的國際標準評估各項基建。金管局會參與支付及金融基建委員會與國際證監會組織對實施《基建原則》的監察及評估計劃，亦會參與國際標準制定組織的工作，並參照國際慣例或因應市場及科技發展加強本身的監察規定。同時，如有需要，金管局會與有關當局合作，進一步加強合作監察安排。
mt_raw: The HKMA’s objective is to promote the safety and efficiency of the financial market infrastructures it oversees in accordance with the *Payment Systems and Stored Value Facilities Ordinance* (*Payment Ordinance*), the *Principles for Financial Market Infrastructures* (*Infrastructure Principles*), and the guidelines issued by the Payment and Financial Infrastructure Committee, and to assess the infrastructures as needed by reference to the latest international standards. The HKMA will participate in the Payment and Financial Infrastructure Committee’s and the International Organization of Securities Commissions’ monitoring and assessment programme for the implementation of the *Infrastructure Principles*, as well as in the work of international standard-setting organisations, and will strengthen its own monitoring requirements by reference to international practices or in response to market and technological developments. At the same time, if necessary, the HKMA will work with relevant authorities to further strengthen cooperative monitoring arrangements.

src_raw:
金管局會透過實施巴塞爾銀行監管委員會（巴塞爾委員會）近年發布的標準，進一步優化資本框架，當中包括：
- 2017年12月《巴塞爾協定三：危機後改革的最終方案》、2019年1月（2019年2月修訂）《市場風險最低資本規定》，以及2020年7月《信用估值調整風險架構具針對性的修訂》所載的經修訂資本標準 — 上述經修訂資本標準統稱《巴塞爾協定三》最終改革方案，載明信用風險、市場風險、信用估值調整風險及業務操作風險的新監管處理方法，並引入出項下限規定，以及優化槓桿比率框架。經過2022年的多輪業界諮詢後，金管局計劃在2023年就《銀行業（資本）規則》（《資本規則》）的建議修訂進行法定諮詢，以實施上述各項規定及正值中性逆周期緩衝資本。有關修訂預計於同年內提交立法會進行先訂立後審議程序，並不早於2024年1月1日生效，作為最低要求。
- 2022年12月《加密資產風險承擔的審慎處理方法》金管局計劃按照巴塞爾委員會的時間表，在2025年1月1日於本地實施有關標準，並打算於2023年就相關建議諮詢業界。
mt_raw:
The HKMA will further optimise the capital framework by implementing standards issued in recent years by the Basel Committee on Banking Supervision (Basel Committee), including:
- The revised capital standards set out in the *Basel III: Finalising post-crisis reforms* of December 2017, the *Minimum capital requirements for market risk* of January 2019 (revised in February 2019), and the *Targeted revisions to the credit valuation adjustment risk framework* of July 2020 – collectively referred to as the final Basel III reform package, which sets out new regulatory approaches for credit risk, market risk, credit valuation adjustment risk and operational risk, introduces an output floor requirement, and optimises the leverage ratio framework. Following several rounds of industry consultation in 2022, the HKMA plans to conduct a statutory consultation in 2023 on proposed amendments to the *Banking (Capital) Rules* (*Capital Rules*) to implement these requirements and a neutrally calibrated countercyclical capital buffer. The amendments are expected to be submitted to the Legislative Council for negative vetting in the same year and to take effect no earlier than 1 January 2024 as a minimum requirement.
- *Prudent treatment of cryptoasset exposures* of December 2022. The HKMA plans to implement the standard locally in accordance with the Basel Committee’s timetable on 1 January 2025, and intends to consult the industry on the relevant proposals in 2023.

src_raw: 金管局於2023年3月就《銀行業（風險承擔限度）規則》的建議修訂諮詢業界。有關建議修訂主要是因應金管局實施上文提及的《巴塞爾協定三》最終改革方案下的經修訂資本標準而提出。諮詢文件亦包括就《資本規則》下有關官方實體集中風險的處理方法所作出的其他相應修訂。經修訂規則的目標實施日期將與落實《巴塞爾協定三》最終改革方案的經修訂《資本規則》中的信用風險部分的實施日期一致（即不早於2024年1月1日）。
mt_raw: In March 2023, the HKMA consulted the industry on proposed amendments to the *Banking (Limits on Risk Exposures) Rules*. The proposed amendments are primarily in response to the HKMA’s implementation of the revised capital standards under the final Basel III reform package mentioned above. The consultation paper also includes other corresponding amendments to the treatment of concentration risk of official entities under the *Capital Rules*. The target implementation date of the revised rules will be aligned with that of the credit risk portion of the revised *Capital Rules* implementing the final Basel III reform package (i.e. no earlier than 1 January 2024).

src_raw: 《巴塞爾協定三》最終改革方案中與經修訂資本標準相關的新的及經修訂的披露規定，主要載於巴塞爾委員會分別於2018年12月及2021年11月發出的《第三支柱1 披露規定 — 更新框架》及《修訂市場風險披露規定》。巴塞爾委員會亦於2019年6月發出《修訂槓桿比率披露規定》，藉修訂槓桿比率的披露規定處理對潛在「粉飾櫥窗」（指銀行在報告日期前後減少某些交易的交易量，從而人為地提高報告及公開披露的槓桿比率）的關注。為在香港實施上述新的及經修訂的披露規定，金管局亦正擬備《銀行業（披露）規則》（《披露規則》）的相應修訂，以及經修訂後的標準披露模版及表格，並在過程中徵詢業界意見。預計《披露規則》的修訂將於2023年內連同《資本規則》的修訂一併提交立法會進行先訂立後審議程序。
mt_raw: The new and revised disclosure requirements related to the revised capital standards in the final Basel III reform package are mainly set out in the *Pillar 3 disclosure requirements – updated framework* and the *Revised disclosure requirements for market risk*, issued by the Basel Committee in December 2018 and November 2021 respectively. The Basel Committee also issued the *Revised leverage ratio disclosure requirements* in June 2019, which revised the leverage ratio disclosure requirements to address concerns about potential "window dressing" (where banks reduce the volume of certain trades around the reporting date to artificially increase the reported and publicly disclosed leverage ratio). To implement the above new and revised disclosure requirements in Hong Kong, the HKMA is also preparing corresponding amendments to the *Banking (Disclosure) Rules* (*Disclosure Rules*) and revised standard disclosure templates and forms, and is consulting the industry in the process. It is expected that the amendments to the *Disclosure Rules* will be submitted to the Legislative Council for negative vetting together with the amendments to the *Capital Rules* in 2023.

src_raw: 金管局要有效履行職責，便必須取得社會人士的信任。因此，金管局以嚴謹的態度，履行向公眾解釋其政策及工作的責任，並盡力處理備受社會關注而涉及金管局職責範圍的事項。尤其，金管局透過傳統及社交媒體適時澄清有關金管局政策的失實資訊及謠言。
mt_raw: For the HKMA to perform its duties effectively, it must gain the trust of the community. Therefore, the HKMA takes a rigorous approach to fulfilling its responsibility to explain its policies and work to the public, and makes every effort to address issues of public concern that fall within the scope of the HKMA’s responsibilities. In particular, the HKMA uses traditional and social media to clarify misinformation and rumours about the HKMA’s policies in a timely manner.

terms: {'商業秘密': 'commercial confidentiality', '機密資料': 'confidential information', '法定限制': 'statutory restrictions', '立法會': 'Legislative Council', '財政司司長': 'Financial Secretary', '金融管理專員': 'Monetary Authority'}
src_raw:
金融管理專員由財政司司長委任，因此金管局透過財政司司長向公眾負責；而由於金管局的職權由立法會通過的法律制訂，因此金管局亦透過立法會向公眾負責。金管局亦明白本身肩負更廣泛的責任，就是促進公眾對金管局角色及目標的認識，並密切留意社會人士所關注的事項。金管局在執行日常工作及與社會保持廣泛聯繫時，堅守盡力提高透明度及保持開放的政策。這項政策有兩大目標：
- 在顧及市場敏感性、商業秘密及機密資料披露的法定限制下，盡量使金融界及公眾充分了解金管局的工作；及
- 確保金管局掌握社會脈搏，並對公眾意見作出適當回應。
mt_raw:
The Financial Secretary for Financial Administration is appointed by the Financial Secretary, so the HKMA is accountable to the public through the Financial Secretary. And since the HKMA’s powers are established by laws passed by the Legislative Council, the HKMA is also accountable to the public through the Legislative Council. The HKMA also understands that it has a broader responsibility to promote public understanding of the HKMA’s role and objectives, and to keep a close eye on issues of public concern. In carrying out its day-to-day work and maintaining broad contact with society, the HKMA adheres to a policy of striving to increase transparency and maintain openness. This policy has two main objectives:
- to enable the financial sector and the public to understand the HKMA’s work as fully as possible, subject to market sensitivities, commercial confidentiality and statutory restrictions on the disclosure of confidential information; and
- to ensure that the HKMA is in touch with the pulse of society and responds appropriately to public opinion.

src_raw: 金管局在透明度方面致力達致國際最高標準，與傳媒保持廣泛聯繫之餘，亦出版各種中英文期刊及專題刊物。金管局的雙語網站(www.hkma.gov.hk)除有專門環節列載經濟研究、統計資料、監管資源、消費者資訊及其他課題外，還載有大量金管局出版的刊物、新聞稿、演辭及簡報會資料文件。此外，金管局又利用社交媒體平台，以能在數碼時代中更有效與公眾溝通。金管局辦事處設有資訊中心，分為圖書館及展覽館兩部分，每星期開放6日予公眾參觀及使用。有關金管局與公眾溝通及聯繫的工作，詳見「機構職能」一章（第157至162頁）。
mt_raw: The HKMA strives to achieve the highest international standards of transparency. In addition to maintaining extensive contact with the media, it publishes various journals and special publications in Chinese and English. The HKMA’s bilingual website (www.hkma.gov.hk) contains dedicated sections on economic research, statistics, regulatory resources, consumer information and other topics, as well as a large number of publications, press releases, speeches and briefing papers published by the HKMA. In addition, the HKMA uses social media platforms to communicate more effectively with the public in the digital age. The HKMA office has an information centre, divided into a library and an exhibition hall, which is open to the public for six days a week. Details of the HKMA’s communication and liaison work with the public can be found in the chapter on “Institutional Functions” (pages 157 to 162).

src_raw: 受本地及外圍環境各項不利因素拖累，香港經濟在2022年收縮3.5%（表1及圖1）。本地方面，由於香港爆發第五波新冠病毒疫情，私人消費在第1季急跌，其後受惠於社交距離措施逐步放寬及政府消費券計劃的刺激，私人消費再度錄得按季增長。在營商氣氛疲弱及金融狀況收緊下，整體投資支出較2021年顯著下跌。對外方面，隨着外部需求轉弱，加上內地與香港之間的跨境陸路貨運受阻，香港貨物出口下挫。服務輸出依然大致疲弱，部分反映訪港旅遊活動低迷，但其後隨着政府於9月下旬撤銷抵港強制檢疫要求，情況於第4季稍為改善。
mt_raw: Hong Kong’s economy contracted by 3.5% in 2022, weighed down by various unfavourable local and external factors (Table 1 and Chart 1). Locally, private consumption fell sharply in the first quarter due to the outbreak of the fifth wave of COVID-19 in Hong Kong, but then recorded a quarter-on-quarter increase, benefiting from the gradual relaxation of social distancing measures and the stimulus effect of the government’s consumption voucher scheme. Overall investment expenditure declined significantly compared with 2021, amid weak business sentiment and tightening financial conditions. Externally, Hong Kong’s goods exports slumped as external demand weakened and cross-border land freight between mainland China and Hong Kong was disrupted. Exports of services remained broadly weak, partly reflecting subdued inbound tourism, but the situation improved slightly in the fourth quarter after the government lifted the compulsory quarantine requirement for inbound travellers in late September.

src_raw: 本地通脹壓力於2022年稍升，但仍屬溫和。具體而言，按年基本通脹率逐步上升至12月2%的溫和水平，其中外圍能源及食品價格高企的影響部分被溫和的本地成本壓力所抵銷，尤其是偏軟的房屋租金（圖2）。此外，在經濟活動疲弱下，名義工資增長及商業樓宇租金持續偏軟，亦有助遏抑通脹。2022年全年合計，基本及整體通脹率分別為1.7%及1.9%。
mt_raw: Local inflationary pressures edged up in 2022 but remained moderate. Specifically, the year-on-year underlying inflation rate rose gradually to a moderate level of 2% in December, with the impact of high external energy and food prices partly offset by moderate local cost pressures, especially soft housing rentals (Chart 2). In addition, subdued economic activity kept nominal wage growth and commercial rentals soft, which also helped to contain inflation. For 2022 as a whole, the underlying and overall inflation rates were 1.7% and 1.9% respectively.

terms: {'勞動人口': 'labour force', '勞動人口參與率': 'labour force participation rate', '私營機構職位空缺': 'private sector vacancies'}
src_raw: 疫情下勞工市場狀況在2022年初急速惡化，但隨後持續改善。失業率在4月升至5.4%的高位後，於12月顯著回落至3.5%（圖3），當中大多數行業的失業率均有所下降。總就業人數（圖3）及私營機構職位空缺回升，反映整體勞工需求逐步回復，惟總就業人數仍低於疫情前水平。名義工資和勞工收入的按年升幅亦略為加快。另一方面，與去年同期比較，勞動人口於12月略為減少1.5%，部分原因是勞動人口參與率輕微下跌。
mt_raw: The labour market situation deteriorated rapidly in early 2022 amid the pandemic, but then continued to improve. The unemployment rate rose to a high of 5.4% in April, but fell significantly to 3.5% in December (Chart 3), with unemployment rates declining in most industries. Total employment (Chart 3) and private sector vacancies rebounded, reflecting a gradual recovery in overall labour demand, although total employment remained below pre-pandemic levels. The year-on-year growth of nominal wages and labour income also accelerated slightly. On the other hand, the labour force decreased slightly by 1.5% in December compared with the same period last year, partly due to a slight decline in the labour force participation rate.

src_raw: 本港股市在2022年出現大幅波動。承接2021年的下行趨勢，恒生指數加速下跌，在2022年10月31日收報14,687點，是自2009年以來的最低水平（圖4）。股市顯著調整，最初是由市場對本地新冠病毒疫情、美國加息及俄烏局勢的憂慮加劇所觸發，其後由於環球金融狀況收緊及內地新冠病毒疫情導致環球經濟前景轉差，令股市調整幅度進一步擴大。股市在年內最後兩個月重拾一些上升動力，部分受到內地優化防疫抗疫措施所支持。恒生指數於年底收報19,781點，較2021年底顯著下跌15.5%，連續第三年下挫。
mt_raw: Hong Kong’s stock market experienced significant volatility in 2022. Continuing the downward trend of 2021, the Hang Seng Index accelerated its decline, closing at 14,687 on 31 October 2022 – its lowest level since 2009 (Chart 4). The significant market correction was initially triggered by heightened market concerns over the local COVID-19 pandemic, US interest rate hikes and the Russia-Ukraine situation, and was further exacerbated by tightening global financial conditions and a deterioration in the global economic outlook due to the COVID-19 pandemic in mainland China. The stock market regained some upward momentum in the last two months of the year, partly supported by mainland China’s optimisation of its pandemic prevention and control measures. The Hang Seng Index closed at 19,781 at the end of the year, down significantly by 15.5% from the end of 2021, marking the third consecutive year of decline.

terms: {'住宅物業市場': 'residential property market', '供樓人士': 'mortgage borrowers', '成交量': 'housing transactions', '按揭供款負擔': 'repayment burden', '按揭利率': 'mortgage interest rates', '置業負擔能力': 'housing affordability', '非住宅物業市場': 'non-residential property markets'}
src_raw: 在金融狀況收緊及經濟活動疲弱下，住宅物業市場亦有所受壓。樓價於2022年回落15%（圖4），成交量也大幅縮減39%至45,050宗，創下有紀錄以來的新低。儘管樓價下跌，置業負擔能力仍然偏緊。實際按揭利率於年內由約1.6厘上升至3.375至3.625厘，增加供樓人士的按揭供款負擔。非住宅物業市場亦進一步回軟。在空置率高企下，其價格有所回落，租金亦維持偏軟。
mt_raw: The residential property market also came under pressure amid tightening financial conditions and weak economic activity. Property prices fell by 15% in 2022 (Chart 4), while transaction volume shrank sharply by 39% to 45,050 – a record low. Despite the decline in property prices, housing affordability remained tight. The actual mortgage rate rose from around 1.6% at the beginning of the year to between 3.375% and 3.625%, increasing the mortgage repayment burden for homeowners. The non-residential property market also weakened further. Amid high vacancy rates, prices fell and rents remained soft.

terms: {'先進經濟體': 'advanced economies', '入境旅遊': 'inbound tourism', '內地與香港': 'Mainland and Hong Kong', '政策利率走勢': 'policy rate path', '美國聯邦儲備局': 'US Federal Reserve', '聯邦儲備局': 'Federal Reserve', '資本開支': 'capital spending', '香港貨物出口': 'Hong Kong’s exports of goods'}
src_raw: 受惠於內地與香港全面通關，預期2023年香港經濟增長將由低位復甦。儘管先進經濟體增長預期放緩將繼續拖累香港貨物出口，但內地經濟復甦及跨境陸路貨運限制撤銷，應能為本港經濟提供支持。內地與香港全面通關亦有望令香港入境旅遊及其他服務輸出顯著受惠，並提振本地營商氣氛及資本開支。私人消費亦將會在勞工市場轉強下進一步改善。政府預測2023年全年實質本地生產總值會顯著增長，介乎3.5至5.5%。然而，香港經濟增長前景仍受眾多風險及不明朗因素所影響，並很大程度上取決於美國聯邦儲備局政策利率走勢、全球增長前景、地緣政治局勢持續緊張以及本地入境旅遊的復甦步伐。
mt_raw: Thanks to the full resumption of border crossings between mainland China and Hong Kong, the city’s economic growth is expected to recover from a low base in 2023. Although the slowdown in growth in advanced economies will continue to weigh on Hong Kong’s goods exports, mainland China’s economic recovery and the removal of restrictions on cross-border land freight should provide support to the local economy. The full resumption of border crossings between mainland China and Hong Kong is also expected to significantly benefit inbound tourism and other services exports in Hong Kong, and boost local business sentiment and capital expenditure. Private consumption will also improve further as the labour market strengthens. The government forecasts that real GDP will grow significantly, by between 3.5% and 5.5%, for the whole of 2023. However, Hong Kong’s economic growth outlook remains subject to many risks and uncertainties, and depends to a large extent on the interest rate path of the US Federal Reserve, the global growth outlook, continued geopolitical tensions and the pace of recovery in inbound tourism.

src_raw: 香港銀行體系在2022年面對充滿挑戰的宏觀經濟環境，包括年初爆發第五波新冠病毒疫情、地緣政治局勢升溫，以及全球各大央行大幅度加息應對通脹上升等。面對各項挑戰，香港銀行應付裕如，資本及流動性狀況繼續保持充裕。年內銀行體系面對的信貸風險增加，但整體資產質素維持於健康水平。與此同時，利率上升促使銀行淨利息收入增加，但其正面影響因呆壞帳準備金增加及費用與佣金收入減少而被局部抵銷。整體而言，零售銀行盈利較2021年改善。
mt_raw: Hong Kong’s banking sector faced a challenging macroeconomic environment in 2022, including the outbreak of the fifth wave of COVID-19 at the beginning of the year, heightened geopolitical tensions and significant interest rate hikes by major central banks around the world to combat rising inflation. In the face of these challenges, Hong Kong’s banks coped well, with capital and liquidity conditions remaining robust. The banking sector faced increased credit risks during the year, but overall asset quality remained healthy. Meanwhile, rising interest rates boosted banks’ net interest income, but the positive impact was partly offset by higher provisions for non-performing loans and lower fee and commission income. Overall, retail banking profitability improved compared with 2021.

src_raw: 銀行體系的特定分類貸款比率由2021年底的0.89%上升至2022年底的1.38%，逾期及經重組貸款比率於同期由0.56%升至0.85%（圖5）。中國內地相關貸款的特定分類貸款比率於2022年底為2.21%，亦較2021年底的0.89%上升。特定分類貸款比率上升，主要是由於部分內地房地產發展商的貸款評級被下調。儘管如此，銀行撥備充足，截至2022年底，銀行信貸撥備覆蓋率（即信貸撥備和特定分類貸款比率）約維持於80%。若將抵押品變現價值從呆壞帳餘額中扣除，銀行信貸撥備覆蓋率約140%。另一方面，2022年底住宅按揭貸款及信用卡貸款的拖欠比率仍然處於低位，分別為0.06%及0.23%（圖6）。
mt_raw: The banking sector’s specific classified loan ratio rose from 0.89% at the end of 2021 to 1.38% at the end of 2022, while the ratio of overdue and restructured loans rose from 0.56% to 0.85% over the same period (Chart 5). The specific classified loan ratio for mainland China-related loans was 2.21% at the end of 2022, also up from 0.89% at the end of 2021. The rise in the specific classified loan ratio was mainly due to downgrades in the credit ratings of some mainland property developers. Nevertheless, banks had sufficient provisions, with the banking sector’s credit provision coverage ratio (i.e. credit provisions and specific classified loan ratio) remaining at around 80% at the end of 2022. If the realisable value of collateral is deducted from the non-performing loan balance, the banking sector’s credit provision coverage ratio is around 140%. On the other hand, the delinquency ratios for residential mortgage loans and credit card loans remained low at 0.06% and 0.23% respectively at the end of 2022 (Chart 6).

src_raw: 銀行體系在2022年繼續錄得盈利。年內零售銀行的整體除稅前經營溢利上升19.0%（圖7）。盈利改善是受惠於淨利息收入（+34%）及外匯與衍生工具收入增加（+72%），但部分升幅被呆壞帳準備金增加（+151%）及費用與佣金收入減少（–19%）所抵銷。在加息環境下，淨息差由上一年的0.98%擴闊至2022年的1.31%（圖8）。年內市場波動增加，亦令銀行來自外匯及衍生工具業務的收入增加。呆壞帳準備金增加是由於須為新的特定分類貸款預留特殊準備金，而在金融市場表現疲弱下，費用及佣金收入減少。零售銀行成本與收入比率由2021年的54.7%，降至2022年的48.0%（圖9）。
mt_raw: The banking sector continued to record profits in 2022. Overall pre-tax operating profit of retail banks rose by 19.0% during the year (Chart 7). The improvement in profitability was driven by higher net interest income (+34%) and foreign exchange and derivatives income (+72%), but was partly offset by higher provisions for non-performing loans (+151%) and lower fee and commission income (–19%). In a rising interest rate environment, the net interest margin widened from 0.98% in the previous year to 1.31% in 2022 (Chart 8). Increased market volatility during the year also boosted banks’ income from foreign exchange and derivatives businesses. The increase in provisions for non-performing loans was due to the need to set aside special provisions for new specific classified loans, while fee and commission income declined amid weak financial market performance. The cost-to-income ratio of retail banks fell from 54.7% in 2021 to 48.0% in 2022 (Chart 9).

src_raw: 2022年銀行體系資產負債表擴大2.5%。資產上升是由於外匯及衍生工具持倉按市價計值增加。面對外圍不明朗因素及利率趨升，年內貸款需求減弱。相比2021年錄得3.8%的增幅，2022年貸款總額減少3.0%。其中在香港境外使用的貸款減少10.2%，貿易融資減少13.5%，在香港使用的貸款則稍增0.9%。中國內地相關貸款繼2021年增長3.7%後，於2022年減少4.4%。
mt_raw: The banking sector’s balance sheet expanded by 2.5% in 2022. The increase in assets was due to higher mark-to-market valuation of foreign exchange and derivatives positions. Amid external uncertainties and rising interest rates, loan demand weakened during the year. Compared with a 3.8% increase in 2021, total loans decreased by 3.0% in 2022. Of these, loans used outside Hong Kong decreased by 10.2%, trade finance decreased by 13.5% and loans used in Hong Kong increased slightly by 0.9%. Mainland China-related loans, after growing by 3.7% in 2021, decreased by 4.4% in 2022.

src_raw: 銀行體系的流動性狀況繼續維持穩健，成為在宏觀經濟環境不明朗因素加劇下的重要支柱。第1類機構的季度平均流動性覆蓋比率在2022年第4季為162.3%，第2類機構的季度平均流動性維持比率為63.2%（圖13）。銀行體系的主要資金來源仍然是客戶存款。於2022年底，第1類機構的穩定資金淨額比率及第2A類機構的核心資金比率分別為137.7%及155.7%（圖14）。以上所有4個比率均遠高於法定最低要求。
mt_raw: The banking sector’s liquidity position remained robust, serving as an important pillar amid heightened uncertainties in the macroeconomic environment. The quarterly average liquidity coverage ratio of Category 1 institutions was 162.3% in the fourth quarter of 2022, and the quarterly average liquidity maintenance ratio of Category 2 institutions was 63.2% (Chart 13). Customer deposits remained the main source of funding for the banking sector. At the end of 2022, the stable funding net amount ratio of Category 1 institutions and the core funding ratio of Category 2A institutions were 137.7% and 155.7% respectively (Chart 14). All four of these ratios were well above the statutory minimum requirements.

src_raw: 隨着美國收緊貨幣政策，港元在2022年轉弱，弱方兌換保證於5月至11月期間被觸發41次。在本港股市成交轉旺及年底季節性資金需求的帶動下，港元在11月中開始轉強。在聯繫匯率制度下，香港銀行同業拆息大致跟隨美元銀行同業拆息的走勢。由於美國持續加息，香港銀行同業拆息於2022年內逐步上升。整體而言，港元外匯及貨幣市場保持穩定，交易暢順有序。作為香港貨幣及金融穩定的基石，聯繫匯率制度一直展現強大抵禦外來衝擊的能力。
mt_raw: As the US tightened its monetary policy, the Hong Kong dollar weakened in 2022, with the weak-side Convertibility Undertaking triggered 41 times between May and November. However, the Hong Kong dollar began to strengthen in mid-November, driven by increased trading activity in the local stock market and seasonal funding demand at year-end. Under the Linked Exchange Rate System, Hong Kong interbank offered rates generally follow the trend of US dollar interbank offered rates. As the US continued to raise interest rates, Hong Kong interbank offered rates rose gradually in 2022. Overall, Hong Kong’s foreign exchange and monetary markets remained stable, with smooth and orderly transactions. As the cornerstone of Hong Kong’s monetary and financial stability, the Linked Exchange Rate System has consistently demonstrated a strong ability to resist external shocks.

src_raw: 香港貨幣政策的主要目標是維持貨幣穩定，即確保港元匯價穩定，使港元在外匯市場兌美元的匯率保持在7.75至7.85港元兌1美元的區間內。該貨幣體制主要採用貨幣發行局制度，規定由外匯基金所持的美元儲備向貨幣基礎提供最少百分之百的支持；貨幣基礎若有變動，美元儲備亦必須作出相應增減，與貨幣基礎的變動百分之百配合。
mt_raw: The primary objective of Hong Kong’s monetary policy is to maintain monetary stability, i.e. to ensure the stability of the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate, so that the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate against the US dollar in the foreign exchange market remains within the range of 7.75 to 7.85 Hong Kong dollars per US dollar. The monetary system primarily adopts a Currency Board System, which stipulates that the US dollar reserves held by the Exchange Fund must provide at least 100% backing to the monetary base; if the monetary base changes, the US dollar reserves must also be adjusted accordingly, matching the change in the monetary base by 100%.

src_raw: 金管局透過自動利率調節機制及履行兌換保證的堅決承諾來維持港元匯率的穩定。當強方（或弱方）兌換保證被觸發，金管局會應銀行要求，按每美元兌7.75港元向銀行沽出港元、買入美元（或按7.85港元買入港元、沽出美元），使總結餘增加（或減少），令港元利率下跌（或上升），從而促使港元匯率回復到7.75至7.85的兌換範圍。
mt_raw: The HKMA maintains the stability of the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate through an automatic interest rate adjustment mechanism and a firm commitment to honour the exchange guarantee. When the strong-side (or weak-side) Convertibility Undertaking is triggered, the HKMA will, at the request of banks, sell Hong Kong dollars to banks and buy US dollars at the rate of 7.75 Hong Kong dollars per US dollar (or buy Hong Kong dollars and sell US dollars at 7.85 Hong Kong dollars), causing the Aggregate Balance to increase (or decrease), leading to a fall (or rise) in Hong Kong dollar interest rates, thereby prompting the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate to return to the range of 7.75 to 7.85.

src_raw: 受到本港股市調整、市場預期美國進一步加息，以及在香港銀行同業拆息與倫敦銀行同業拆息的負息差下的套息交易帶動，港元在2022年初轉弱，並在其後的月份一直貼近弱方兌換保證水平。弱方兌換保證於5月至11月期間被觸發41次。在本港股市成交轉旺及年底季節性資金需求的帶動下，港元在11月中開始轉強（圖1）。整體而言，港元外匯市場在2022年全年繼續運作正常。
mt_raw: Driven by adjustments in the local stock market, expectations of further interest rate hikes by the US, and carry trades amid the negative interest rate differential between Hong Kong interbank offered rates and London interbank offered rates, the Hong Kong dollar weakened at the beginning of 2022 and remained close to the weak-side Convertibility Undertaking level in subsequent months. The weak-side Convertibility Undertaking was triggered 41 times between May and November. However, the Hong Kong dollar began to strengthen in mid-November, driven by increased trading activity in the local stock market and seasonal funding demand at year-end (Chart 1). Overall, the Hong Kong dollar foreign exchange market continued to operate normally throughout 2022.

src_raw: 為應付銀行對外匯基金票據的持續需求，金管局於2022年初增發總值400億港元的外匯基金票據。此外，金管局在2022年5月至11月間按照聯繫匯率制度（聯匯制度）的設計，應銀行要求於弱方兌換保證匯率水平共買入2,421億港元。總結餘由2021年底的3,775億港元，減少至2022年底的963億港元，反映增發外匯基金票據，以及弱方兌換保證被觸發的影響。與此同時，未償還外匯基金票據及債券總額在年內由11,488億港元，稍增至12,004億港元。因此，總結餘與未償還外匯基金票據及債券總額由2021年底的15,263 億港元，減少至 2022 年底的 12,967 億港元（圖2）。整體貨幣基礎仍然由外匯儲備提供十足支持。
mt_raw: To meet banks’ continued demand for Exchange Fund Bills, the HKMA issued an additional HK$40 billion of Exchange Fund Bills at the beginning of 2022. In addition, between May and November 2022, in accordance with the design of the Linked Exchange Rate System, the HKMA bought a total of HK$242.1 billion at the weak-side Convertibility Undertaking exchange rate level at the request of banks. The Aggregate Balance decreased from HK$377.5 billion at the end of 2021 to HK$96.3 billion at the end of 2022, reflecting the impact of the additional issuance of Exchange Fund Bills and the triggering of the weak-side Convertibility Undertaking. Meanwhile, the total amount of outstanding Exchange Fund Bills and Notes increased slightly from HK$1,148.8 billion to HK$1,200.4 billion during the year. As a result, the Aggregate Balance and the total amount of outstanding Exchange Fund Bills and Notes decreased from HK$1,526.3 billion at the end of 2021 to HK$1,296.7 billion at the end of 2022 (Chart 2). The overall monetary base continued to be fully backed by foreign exchange reserves.

src_raw: 在聯匯制度下，香港銀行同業拆息大致跟隨美元銀行同業拆息的走勢。由於美國在2022年持續加息，香港銀行同業拆息逐步上升（圖3）。全年計，隔夜、1個月及3個月香港銀行同業拆息分別上升318、419及473基點至年底時的3.23厘、4.35厘及4.99厘。
mt_raw: Under the Linked Exchange Rate System, Hong Kong interbank offered rates generally follow the trend of US dollar interbank offered rates. As the US continued to raise interest rates in 2022, Hong Kong interbank offered rates rose gradually (Chart 3). For the year as a whole, overnight, one-month and three-month Hong Kong interbank offered rates rose by 318, 419 and 473 basis points respectively to 3.23%, 4.35% and 4.99% at year-end.

src_raw: 因應美國聯邦基金利率目標範圍上調，基本利率上調7次，合共4.25個百分點（即425基點），由0.5厘上升至4.75厘（圖3）。在零售層面，隨着美國上調政策利率，多間銀行在9月下旬調高最優惠貸款利率12.5基點，在11月初再調高25基點，以及在12月中再調高25基點。部分銀行亦於年內提高以香港銀行同業拆息為基礎的新批按揭利率上限。整體而言，香港貨幣市場繼續正常運作。貼現窗借貸由2021年的68億港元增至2022年的84億港元。
mt_raw: In response to the upward adjustment of the target range for the US federal funds rate, the Base Rate was raised seven times by a total of 4.25 percentage points (i.e. 425 basis points), from 0.5% to 4.75% (Chart 3). At the retail level, as the US raised its policy rate, several banks raised their best lending rates by 12.5 basis points in late September, by a further 25 basis points in early November, and by another 25 basis points in mid-December. Some banks also raised the cap on new mortgage rates based on the Hong Kong interbank offered rate during the year. Overall, the Hong Kong monetary market continued to operate normally, with discount window lending increasing from HK$6.8 billion in 2021 to HK$8.4 billion in 2022.

src_raw: 接近40年來，聯匯制度一直是香港金融體系的重要支柱，展現強大的應對挑戰的能力。儘管2022年全球金融狀況反覆，港元外匯及貨幣市場維持有序運作，反映聯匯制度穩健有效。政府亦堅決維持聯匯制度。國際貨幣基金組織在《2022年對外部門報告》一再重申香港擁有具透明度的規則、龐大的財政及外匯儲備、穩健的金融規管與監管、靈活的經濟，以及審慎的財政架構，確保聯匯制度具公信力。
mt_raw: For nearly 40 years, the Linked Exchange Rate System has been an important pillar of Hong Kong’s financial system, demonstrating a strong ability to cope with challenges. Despite volatile global financial conditions in 2022, Hong Kong’s foreign exchange and monetary markets maintained orderly operations, reflecting the robustness and effectiveness of the Linked Exchange Rate System. The government is also firmly committed to maintaining the system. In its 2022 External Sector Report, the International Monetary Fund reiterated that Hong Kong has transparent rules, substantial fiscal and foreign exchange reserves, sound financial regulation and supervision, a flexible economy, and a prudent fiscal framework, which ensure the credibility of the Linked Exchange Rate System.

src_raw: 穩健的銀行體系對聯匯制度的正常運作具關鍵作用。香港銀行體系繼續運作暢順，流動性及資本狀況以國際標準而言均非常充裕。為確保銀行體系具備抵禦衝擊的能力，金管局一直密切監察銀行的信用、流動性及利率風險管理，以及壓力測試結果，並維持對銀行貸款的監管。
mt_raw: A sound banking system is crucial to the normal operation of the Linked Exchange Rate System. Hong Kong’s banking system continued to operate smoothly, with ample liquidity and capital by international standards. To ensure that the banking system is capable of withstanding shocks, the HKMA has closely monitored banks’ credit, liquidity and interest rate risk management, as well as stress test results, and maintained supervision of bank lending.

src_raw: 為提高貨幣發行局帳目的透明度，自1998年10月起，外匯基金已有部分資產被指定用作支持貨幣基礎。支持比率（即支持資產相對貨幣基礎的比率）於2022年在109.3%至111.0%之間上落，並無觸及上限或下限。該比率於12月31日收報110.1%（圖4）。在聯匯制度下，雖然已指定某些外匯基金資產作為支持組合，但外匯基金的全部資產均可用作支持港元匯率。外匯基金的龐大財政資源，加上香港穩健的銀行體系，為保障香港的貨幣及金融穩定提供強而有力的後盾。
mt_raw: To enhance the transparency of the Currency Board’s accounts, some of the Exchange Fund’s assets have been designated to back the monetary base since October 1998. The backing ratio (i.e. the ratio of backing assets to the monetary base) fluctuated between 109.3% and 111.0% in 2022, without reaching the upper or lower limits. The ratio closed at 110.1% on 31 December (Chart 4). Under the Linked Exchange Rate System, although certain Exchange Fund assets have been designated as the backing portfolio, all Exchange Fund assets can be used to support the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate. The substantial financial resources of the Exchange Fund, together with Hong Kong’s sound banking system, provide a strong safeguard for Hong Kong’s monetary and financial stability.

src_raw: 外匯基金諮詢委員會轄下的貨幣發行委員會負責監察及探討與香港貨幣及金融穩定有關的課題。在2022年，貨幣發行委員會探討的課題包括中國內地物業市況、非銀行機構在住宅按揭市場的角色、深度學習在信用風險評估上的應用，以及一個用作評估港元流動性的監察框架。貨幣發行委員會會議紀錄及金管局向其呈交的貨幣發行局制度運作報告，均載於金管局網站。
mt_raw: The Currency Board Committee, under the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee, is responsible for monitoring and discussing issues related to Hong Kong’s monetary and financial stability. In 2022, the Committee discussed issues including mainland China’s property market conditions, the role of non-bank institutions in the residential mortgage market, the application of deep learning in credit risk assessment, and a monitoring framework for assessing Hong Kong dollar liquidity. The minutes of the Committee’s meetings and the reports on the operation of the Currency Board System submitted by the HKMA to the Committee are available on the HKMA website.

src_raw: 儘管宏觀環境充滿不確定性及挑戰，加上金融市場異常波動，香港銀行體系於2022年維持穩健。年內金管局亦加強對認可機構信用及市場風險管理的監管。此外，鑑於網絡威脅持續增加及銀行業數碼轉型步伐加快，金管局與認可機構緊密合作，提升認可機構的運作穩健性及網絡防衛能力。
mt_raw: Despite macroeconomic uncertainties and challenges, coupled with abnormal volatility in financial markets, Hong Kong’s banking system remained robust in 2022. During the year, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) also strengthened its supervision of credit and market risk management in authorised institutions. In addition, given the continued increase in cyber threats and the accelerated pace of digital transformation in the banking sector, the HKMA worked closely with authorised institutions to enhance their operational resilience and cyber defence capabilities.

src_raw: 操守監管方面，金管局加強有關「先買後付」產品的消費者保障，並就物業轉按交易提供多一種支付安排。金管局又與其他監管機構合作，就虛擬資產的可持續發展制定監管架構，精簡投資產品銷售程序，以及推出全新的信託業務監管制度。年內有關個人信貸資料的「多間信貸資料服務機構」模式下的「信貸資料平台」啟用，並推出新的強制性背景查核計劃，以應對「滾動的壞蘋果」現象。此外，面對因疫情而實施的旅遊限制，金管局協助推出便利措施讓客戶重新啟動銀行戶口。
mt_raw: In terms of conduct supervision, the HKMA strengthened consumer protection for ‘buy now, pay later’ products and introduced an additional payment arrangement for property mortgage refinancing transactions. The HKMA also collaborated with other regulators to develop a regulatory framework for the sustainable development of virtual assets, streamline the sales process for investment products, and introduce a new regulatory regime for trust business. During the year, a credit information platform under the ‘multi-credit information service providers’ model for personal credit information was launched, and a new mandatory background check programme was introduced to address the ‘rolling bad apples’ phenomenon. Furthermore, in response to travel restrictions imposed due to the pandemic, the HKMA facilitated the introduction of measures to enable customers to reactivate their bank accounts.

src_raw: 因應最新的香港洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集風險評估，金管局與銀行透過公私營夥伴合作（包括反訛騙及洗黑錢情報工作組），鞏固香港的打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集生態圈，以及加強應對騙案。此外，金管局亦與策略夥伴合作，以能更充分了解及有效管理日益複雜的地緣政治環境所帶來的風險及不穩定因素。金管局又透過「反洗錢合規科技實驗室」系列進一步推動業界運用數據及科技，並同時加快金管局在反洗錢工作中採用監管科技的步伐。在國際事務方面，金管局積極參與財務行動特別組織的工作。
mt_raw: In response to Hong Kong’s latest risk assessment on money laundering and terrorist financing, the HKMA and banks strengthened Hong Kong’s anti-money laundering and counter-terrorist financing ecosystem and enhanced their response to fraud cases through public-private partnerships, including the Anti-Deception and Anti-Money Laundering Intelligence Taskforce. In addition, the HKMA collaborated with strategic partners to better understand and effectively manage the risks and instability arising from an increasingly complex geopolitical environment. The HKMA also further promoted the use of data and technology in the industry through the ‘Anti-Money Laundering Compliance Technology Lab’ series, while accelerating its adoption of regulatory technology in anti-money laundering work. Internationally, the HKMA actively participated in the work of the Financial Action Task Force.

src_raw: 銀行可能因營運方式，甚或在極端情況下因失序地倒閉而影響銀行體系的穩定。作為監管當局，金融管理專員在保障金融穩定方面擔當重要角色，確保銀行有能力抵禦衝擊及應對危機恢復常態，以最終有助防止出現倒閉。金融管理專員負責對銀行進行審慎監管，以及認可香港的持牌銀行、有限制牌照銀行及接受存款公司（統稱「認可機構」）。
mt_raw: Banks may affect the stability of the banking system due to their operating methods, or even in extreme cases, due to disorderly failures. As a regulatory authority, the Commissioner of Financial Management plays a crucial role in safeguarding financial stability by ensuring that banks have the ability to withstand shocks and recover from crises, ultimately helping to prevent failures. The Commissioner of Financial Management is responsible for prudential supervision of banks and for authorising Hong Kong’s licensed banks, restricted licence banks, and deposit-taking companies (collectively referred to as ‘authorised institutions’).

src_raw: 香港的審慎監管制度並非為確保「零風險」而設。作為其中一個處置機制當局，金融管理專員力求確保一旦有認可機構不再可持續經營，能有秩序地處理其倒閉。為此，香港已設立金融機構處置機制，金融管理專員在該機制下為認可機構（以及其他類型機構）的處置機制當局。為落實香港的處置機制，有必要制定處置規則及政策標準、進行處置規劃以排除認可機構處置可行性的障礙，以及建立金管局處置瀕臨倒閉認可機構的運作能力。為有效執行上述工作，金管局採納與國際一致及協調的方法。
mt_raw: Hong Kong’s prudential regulatory regime is not designed to ensure ‘zero risk’. As one of the resolution authorities, the Commissioner of Financial Management strives to ensure that if an authorised institution can no longer operate sustainably, its failure can be handled in an orderly manner. To this end, Hong Kong has established a financial institution resolution mechanism, under which the Commissioner of Financial Management serves as the resolution authority for authorised institutions (and other types of institutions). To implement Hong Kong’s resolution mechanism, it is necessary to develop resolution rules and policy standards, conduct resolution planning to eliminate obstacles to the feasibility of authorised institution resolutions, and establish the HKMA’s operational capability to resolve authorised institutions on the verge of failure. To effectively carry out these tasks, the HKMA adopts an internationally consistent and coordinated approach.

src_raw: 除了非現場審查工作外，金管局亦對認可機構的各項業務進行定期現場審查。從審慎監管角度而言，信用風險管理為主要監管重點之一。同時，由於銀行運用科技的情況日趨普及，業務操作風險及科技風險管理是另一個監管重點。隨着綠色及可持續銀行業在香港急速發展，金管局亦已進行一輪以氣候風險管理為重點的專題審查。在操守監管方面，金管局對認可機構的證券、投資產品、保險及強制性公積金（強積金）相關業務進行現場審查，並以專題評估作為配合，以審視被評估為屬較高風險的範疇。
mt_raw: In addition to off-site inspections, the HKMA conducted regular on-site inspections of various businesses of authorised institutions. From a prudential supervision perspective, credit risk management was one of the main supervisory priorities. At the same time, as banks increasingly use technology, operational risk and technology risk management became another supervisory focus. With the rapid development of green and sustainable banking in Hong Kong, the HKMA also conducted a round of thematic inspections focused on climate risk management. In terms of conduct supervision, the HKMA conducted on-site inspections of authorised institutions’ securities, investment products, insurance, and Mandatory Provident Fund (MPF) related businesses, complemented by thematic assessments to review areas deemed to be of higher risk.

src_raw: 金管局自2009年起先後推出多輪逆周期宏觀審慎監管措施，已經加強銀行的風險管理及香港銀行體系抵禦本港樓市一旦逆轉的能力。新批出住宅按揭貸款的平均按揭成數於2022年12月為57%，而有關按揭成數於2009年9月推出首輪逆周期措施前為64%。新批出按揭的平均供款與入息比率維持在低水平，於2022年12月為39%，而在2010年8月首度推出有關比率上限時為41%（圖1）。
mt_raw: Since 2009, the HKMA has introduced a number of rounds of countercyclical macroprudential regulatory measures, which have strengthened banks’ risk management and the Hong Kong banking system’s ability to withstand a potential reversal in the local property market. mt_raw: Hong Kong has made good progress in consolidating its position as a global offshore renminbi (RMB) business hub across several areas. Thanks to ample RMB liquidity, world-class market infrastructure and various interconnectivity mechanisms between the mainland and Hong Kong, Hong Kong has become the preferred platform for mainland funds to enter international markets and for international investors to invest in the rapidly growing mainland market.

src_raw: 香港進一步鞏固其作為離岸人民幣樞紐的地位，年內離岸人民幣業務穩健增長。香港在促進內地與國際金融市場之間的資金流方面發揮關鍵作用，香港與內地間的互聯互通機制被公認為國際投資者進入在岸資本市場及內地投資者配置離岸資產的首選渠道。在2022年，債券通「北向通」成交額佔境外投資者在中國銀行間債券市場整體成交額的61%。債券通「南向通」及「跨境理財通」自2021年開通以來一直運作暢順。金管局與中國人民銀行（人民銀行）和證券及期貨事務監察委員會（證監會）聯合宣布開展「互換通」，把香港與內地的金融合作進一步擴展至衍生品市場，並強化了香港作為主要離岸人民幣業務樞紐及風險管理中心的地位。金管局與人民銀行之間現有的貨幣互換協議於7月優化，是加強香港作為離岸人民幣業務樞紐的另一重要里程碑。
mt_raw: Hong Kong further consolidated its position as an offshore RMB hub, with offshore RMB business growing steadily during the year. Hong Kong plays a key role in facilitating capital flows between the mainland and international financial markets, and the interconnectivity mechanisms between Hong Kong and the mainland are recognised as the preferred channels for international investors to access onshore capital markets and for mainland investors to allocate offshore assets. In 2022, Bond Connect Northbound trading volume accounted for 61% of total trading volume by foreign investors in China’s interbank bond market. Bond Connect Southbound and Cross-boundary Wealth Management Connect have been operating smoothly since their launch in 2021. The HKMA, together with the People’s Bank of China and the Securities and Futures Commission, jointly announced the launch of “Swap Connect”, which further expanded financial cooperation between Hong Kong and the mainland to the derivatives market and strengthened Hong Kong’s position as a major offshore RMB business hub and risk management centre. The optimisation of the existing currency swap agreement between the HKMA and the People’s Bank of China in July was another important milestone in strengthening Hong Kong’s position as an offshore RMB business hub.

mt_raw: The HKMA continued to work to enhance the competitiveness of Hong Kong’s financial platform. src_raw: 金融基建的可靠及有效運作，是鞏固香港作為主要國際金融中心地位的關鍵。在2022年，處理銀行同業交易的4個即時支付結算系統（RTGS系統）、債務工具中央結算系統(CMU)及香港交易資料儲存庫均達到100%2的系統可供使用率，高於99.95%的目標水平。債券通「北向通」及「南向通」的交收服務維持暢順。年底時存放在CMU系統的債券中，未償還外匯基金票據及債券總額為12,075億港元，其他債券的未償還總額增至相當於15,733億港元，是2013年以來最高水平。
mt_raw: The reliable and efficient operation of financial infrastructure is key to consolidating Hong Kong’s position as a major international financial centre. In 2022, the four real-time gross settlement (RTGS) systems for processing interbank transactions, the Central Moneymarkets Unit (CMU) debt instrument central clearing system, and the Hong Kong Trade Repository all achieved a system availability rate of 100%*, exceeding the target level of 99.95%. The settlement services of Bond Connect Northbound and Southbound remained smooth. At the end of the year, the outstanding amount of Exchange Fund bills and notes held in the CMU system was HK$1,207.5 billion, and the outstanding amount of other bonds increased to the equivalent of HK$1,573.3 billion, the highest level since 2013.

mt_raw: At the international level, the HKMA actively participated in central banking affairs and played a leadership role in various regional and international committees. src_raw: 繼財政司司長在《2022至23年度財政預算案》宣布，金管局於11月舉辦「國際金融領袖投資峰會」。峰會為期3日，反響熱烈，匯聚26位金融業界翹楚就應對經濟、金融、科技及地緣政治不穩定因素，以及如何把握當中的機遇分享獨到觀點和想法。峰會共有超過200位來自約120間全球金融機構的參加者，當中超過40間機構均由集團董事長或行政總裁親自出席。參與峰會的機構不乏位列全球最大的銀行、證券、資產管理、主權財富基金、私募股權與風險投資、對冲基金及保險公司等金融界別。
mt_raw: Following the announcement by the Financial Secretary in the 2022–23 Budget, the HKMA hosted the International Financial Leaders’ Investment Summit in November. The three-day summit was well received, bringing together 26 leading figures from the financial industry to share their insights on addressing economic, financial, technological and geopolitical instability, as well as seizing opportunities. The summit attracted over 200 participants from around 120 global financial institutions, with more than 40 institutions represented by their group chairmen or CEOs in person. Participating institutions included some of the world’s largest banks, securities firms, asset managers, sovereign wealth funds, private equity and venture capital firms, hedge funds and insurance companies.

src_raw: 香港致力鞏固其作為全球離岸人民幣業務樞紐的地位，包括增強離岸流動性、進一步加強與內地金融市場的聯通，以及提升金融市場基建。年內人民幣業務，包括銀行存款、貿易結算、支付及離岸債券發行，繼續錄得穩健增長。在增強流動性、產品開發及擴大互聯互通機制方面，取得令人鼓舞的進展及成績。2022年國際結算銀行三年一度的外匯及衍生工具市場成交額調查結果，再次確認香港作為人民幣外匯中心的領先地位。
mt_raw: Hong Kong is committed to consolidating its position as a global offshore RMB business hub by enhancing offshore liquidity, further strengthening connectivity with the mainland’s financial markets, and improving financial market infrastructure. During the year, RMB business, including bank deposits, trade settlement, payments and offshore bond issuance, continued to grow steadily. Encouraging progress and achievements were made in enhancing liquidity, product development and expanding interconnectivity mechanisms. The results of the Bank for International Settlements’ triennial survey of foreign exchange and derivatives market turnover in 2022 once again confirmed Hong Kong’s leading position as an RMB foreign exchange centre.

src_raw: 為完善債券通「北向通」的配套，並便利國際投資者管理內地債券投資相關的利率風險，香港與內地於7月宣布開展兩地利率互換市場互聯互通合作（「互換通」）。「互換通」初期會先開通北向交易，讓國際投資者透過香港與內地基礎設施機構之間的連接交易內地的利率互換產品，從而強化香港作為風險管理中心的地位。「互換通」籌備工作正在有序推進，以期盡快開通北向交易。金管局會繼續聯同有關當局及機構探索提供更多元化的風險管理工具，包括推出離岸國債期貨，進一步支持國際投資者投資內地債券市場。
mt_raw: To improve the supporting facilities of Bond Connect Northbound and facilitate international investors in managing interest rate risks associated with mainland bond investments, Hong Kong and the mainland announced in July the launch of a mutual access scheme between the two places’ interest rate swap markets (“Swap Connect”). In the initial stage, Swap Connect will first open northbound trading, allowing international investors to trade mainland interest rate swap products through the connection between Hong Kong and mainland infrastructure institutions, thereby strengthening Hong Kong’s position as a risk management centre. The preparatory work for Swap Connect is progressing in an orderly manner with a view to launching northbound trading as soon as possible. The HKMA will continue to work with relevant authorities and institutions to explore the provision of more diversified risk management tools, including the launch of offshore Treasury futures, to further support international investors in investing in the mainland’s bond market.

src_raw: 2022年的投資環境異常動盪，多種資產類別的價格同時下挫，不僅打破同時持有股票與債券可產生緩減風險作用的傳統投資智慧，更成為近半世紀以來唯一一次股票、債券及主要非美元貨幣匯兌同時錄得負回報的一年。在如此惡劣的投資環境下，外匯基金在2022年錄得投資回報率負4.5%。與年內大部分多元資產基金蒙受重大虧損的情況相比，外匯基金的表現反映金管局的多元化長期資產配置，以及因應外圍最新局勢變化而作出的防禦性部署及戰略性調整，有效減低市場風暴帶來的衝擊。
mt_raw: The investment environment in 2022 was exceptionally turbulent, with prices falling simultaneously across multiple asset classes. This not only undermined the traditional investment principle that holding both stocks and bonds can mitigate risk, but also marked the only year in nearly half a century in which stocks, bonds and major non-US dollar currencies all recorded negative returns. In such an adverse investment environment, the Exchange Fund recorded an investment return of negative 4.5% in 2022. Compared with the significant losses incurred by most multi-asset funds during the year, the performance of the Exchange Fund reflects the HKMA’s diversified long-term asset allocation, as well as its defensive deployment and strategic adjustments in response to the latest external developments, which effectively mitigated the impact of market turmoil.

src_raw: 為能更妥善管理風險及提高中長期回報，金管局以審慎及循序漸進方式將外匯基金的部分資產配置於較多元化的資產類別，包括新興巿場及內地債券與股票、私募股權（包括基建）及房地產。新興巿場及內地債券與股票由投資組合持有，私募股權及房地產投資則由長期增長組合持有。長期增長組合的目標資產配置與其他資產類別的配置，按審慎的風險管理原則及資產組合多元化策略一起制定。
mt_raw: To better manage risks and enhance medium- to long-term returns, the HKMA has prudently and progressively allocated part of the Exchange Fund’s assets to more diversified asset classes, including emerging market and Mainland bonds and equities, private equity (including infrastructure) and real estate. Emerging market and Mainland bonds and equities are held by the Investment Portfolio, while private equity and real estate investments are held by the Long-term Growth Portfolio. The target asset allocation of the Long-term Growth Portfolio and other asset classes is formulated together in accordance with prudent risk management principles and asset portfolio diversification strategies.

src_raw: 外匯基金的投資程序分別以策略性資產配置及戰略性資產配置作基礎。策略性資產配置以投資基準方式反映，亦即外匯基金為達到投資目標而可作出的長線資產配置。外匯基金以策略性配置作為指引，透過戰略性的資產配置，以爭取超越基準的回報。因此，實際配置往往會與基準配置（亦即策略性配置）有所偏離，而實際與基準配置之間的差距稱為「戰略性偏離」。財政司司長經諮詢外匯基金諮詢委員會後制定投資基準及循跡誤差限額，金管局獲授權決定戰略性資產配置及定出戰略性偏離的容許範圍。投資組合經理可在戰略性偏離的容許範圍內管理倉盤，從短期市場變化中獲利。
mt_raw: The Exchange Fund’s investment process is based on both strategic and tactical asset allocation. Strategic asset allocation is reflected in the form of an investment benchmark, which represents the long-term asset allocation that the Exchange Fund can make to achieve its investment objectives. The Exchange Fund uses strategic allocation as a guide and seeks to achieve returns above the benchmark through tactical asset allocation. Therefore, actual allocation often deviates from the benchmark allocation (i.e. the strategic allocation), and the difference between the actual and benchmark allocations is called a “tactical deviation”. The Financial Secretary, after consulting the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee, sets the investment benchmark and tracking error limits, and the HKMA is authorised to determine the tactical asset allocation and set the permissible range of tactical deviations. Portfolio managers can manage positions within the permissible range of tactical deviations to profit from short-term market changes.

src_raw: 金管局的外匯基金投資辦公室專責外匯基金的投資及相關風險管理職能。該辦公室職員負責直接管理外匯基金約70%的投資，包括整個支持組合及部分投資組合。該部分內部管理的投資組合包括不同的環球定息市場投資，並透過衍生工具執行外匯基金的宏觀風險管理策略。
mt_raw: The Exchange Fund Investment Office of the HKMA is responsible for the investment and related risk management functions of the Exchange Fund. The Office’s staff are responsible for directly managing about 70% of the Exchange Fund’s investments, including the entire Backing Portfolio and part of the Investment Portfolio. src_raw: 金管局相信透過適度強調負責任投資及考慮各項投資的可持續長期表現，可更有效達致外匯基金的投資目標，並且減低投資活動涉及的環境、社會及管治(ESG)相關風險。當ESG投資與其他投資項目的經風險調整長期收益相若時，金管局一般會按既定指導性原則優先考慮ESG投資，並已將ESG因素併入外匯基金的公開市場及私募市場的投資管理過程中。有關金管局的負責任投資框架及落實情況，詳見《二零二二年可持續發展報告》之「負責任投資」一章。
mt_raw: The HKMA believes that by appropriately emphasising responsible investment and considering the sustainable long-term performance of investments, the investment objectives of the Exchange Fund can be achieved more effectively, and the environmental, social and governance (ESG) risks associated with investment activities can be reduced. When ESG investments have long-term risk-adjusted returns comparable to those of other investment projects, the HKMA generally gives priority to ESG investments in accordance with established guiding principles, and has integrated ESG factors into the investment management process of the Exchange Fund in both public and private markets. For details on the HKMA’s responsible investment framework and implementation, please refer to the “Responsible Investment” chapter of the 2022 Sustainability Report.

src_raw: 金管局資訊中心設於國際金融中心2期55樓，是向公眾介紹金管局工作及提高公眾對貨幣與銀行業事宜的了解的重要設施。資訊中心分為展覽館及圖書館兩部分。展覽館以互動方式介紹金管局的工作，以及香港貨幣與銀行業的發展；另備資料與展品，供研究香港貨幣、銀行業與金融事務。毗鄰展覽館的圖書館收藏超過26,000冊書籍、期刊及其他刊物，涵蓋香港貨幣、銀行業、金融和中央銀行事務等課題。圖書館亦按照《銀行業條例》第20條規定備存「認可機構及本地代表辦事處紀錄冊」及「認可機構證券業務員工紀錄冊」，供公眾查閱。
mt_raw: The HKMA Information Centre, located on the 55th floor of Two International Finance Centre, is a key facility for introducing the Authority’s work to the public and enhancing their understanding of monetary and banking matters. The Centre consists of an exhibition hall and a library. The exhibition hall uses interactive methods to introduce the HKMA’s work and the development of Hong Kong’s currency and banking system. It also provides materials and exhibits for research on Hong Kong’s currency, banking, and finance. The library, adjacent to the exhibition hall, houses over 26,000 books, journals, and other publications covering Hong Kong’s currency, banking, finance, and central banking. It also maintains the “Register of Authorised Institutions and Local Representative Offices” and the “Register of Employees Engaged in Securities Business of Authorised Institutions” under Section 20 of the Banking Ordinance for public inspection.

mt_raw: To maintain contact with the community and enhance public understanding of its work, the HKMA has been organising public education seminars since 1998. In 2022, it held online seminars that attracted over 2,200 participants from 82 secondary schools. The seminars covered topics such as an introduction to the HKMA’s work, the Linked Exchange Rate System, Hong Kong banknotes, protection of personal digital keys, the Deposit Protection Scheme, and banking career opportunities. To date, these seminars have recorded over 65,000 participants.

mt_raw: The HKMA educates and engages with the public to help them become smart and responsible financial services consumers. Additionally, the HKMA organised radio and social media campaigns to provide smart usage tips for credit cards, personal loans, online shopping, and other payment methods, including “buy now, pay later” products.

mt_raw: To maintain high transparency, the HKMA adopts international financial disclosure standards applicable to central bank operations, including Hong Kong Financial Reporting Standards and other relevant reporting requirements (such as the Special Data Dissemination Standard of the International Monetary Fund). The Finance Department prepares the financial statements of the Exchange Fund in accordance with Hong Kong Financial Reporting Standards, with assistance from independent auditors and accounting professionals. The HKMA also provides detailed disclosure and in-depth analysis of expenditure items and budget information in its Annual Report.

src_raw: 管理貨幣及銀行體系的風險是金管局最重要的工作之一。風險管理除了體現於策略制定外，亦應用於日常運作層面。金管局的風險管理框架設有兩個高層次委員會，即宏觀監察委員會及風險委員會；兩者均由金管局總裁擔任主席。
mt_raw: Managing risks in the monetary and banking system is one of the HKMA’s most important tasks. Risk management is reflected in both strategy formulation and day-to-day operations. The Authority’s risk management framework includes two high-level committees: the Macro Surveillance Committee and the Risk Committee, both chaired by the Chief Executive of the HKMA.

src_raw:
宏觀監察委員會的職權範圍如下：
- 識別香港貨幣及金融體系所面對的潛在風險與威脅，並商討可行對策；
- 檢討現行貨幣及金融體系的風險管理措施，識別可能存在的漏洞，並確保措施完善；及
- 鼓勵跨部門分享宏觀監察資訊，從而提高金管局的宏觀監察能力。
mt_raw:
The Macro Surveillance Committee’s responsibilities are:
- To identify potential risks and threats to Hong Kong’s monetary and financial system and discuss feasible countermeasures.
- To review existing risk management measures in the monetary and financial system, identify potential loopholes, and ensure that measures are adequate.
- To encourage cross-departmental sharing of macro surveillance information, thereby enhancing the HKMA’s macro surveillance capabilities.

terms: {'風險委員會': 'Risk Committee'}
src_raw:
風險委員會的職權範圍如下：
- 識別金管局面對的潛在風險及威脅，並制定策略以減輕有關影響；
- 檢討各部門現行的風險管理制度，識別可能存在的漏洞及重大風險，並確保備有適當措施應付有關情況；
- 統一風險評估準則及方法，並就所識別的風險釐定資源管理的優先次序；及
- 鼓勵及加強金管局內部的風險管理文化，推動適當的授權及監控。
mt_raw:
The Risk Committee’s responsibilities are:
- To identify potential risks and threats faced by the HKMA and formulate strategies to mitigate their impact.
- To review existing risk management systems in each department, identify potential loopholes and major risks, and ensure appropriate measures are in place to address such situations.
- To standardise risk assessment criteria and methods, and determine the priority of resource management for identified risks.
- To encourage and strengthen the risk management culture within the HKMA, promoting appropriate authorisation and monitoring.

terms: {'機構層面': 'entity level', '機構風險管理': 'Organisational risk management', '監控措施': 'controls', '緩解策略': 'mitigating strategies', '部門層面': 'department level', '風險委員會': 'Risk Committee', '風險管理框架': 'risk management framework'}
src_raw: 金管局設有一套穩健的營運風險管理框架，涵蓋機構層面及部門層面的組織架構風險。機構層面的風險泛指涉及整體機構所面對的中期風險，或需要跨部門共同應對的風險。在執行過程中，各部門需按季檢討及匯報其潛在和新興風險，以及所提出之監控措施和緩解策略，再輔以由上而下的機構風險管理模式，由各部門的管理高層識別影響較廣泛的主要風險及建議緩解措施。有關評估會經由風險委員會定期審議和決定適當的跟進行動。
mt_raw: The HKMA has a robust operational risk management framework covering organisational risks at both corporate and departmental levels. Corporate-level risks generally refer to medium-term risks faced by the organisation as a whole or risks requiring cross-departmental cooperation. Departments are required to review and report on potential and emerging risks quarterly, proposing monitoring measures and mitigation strategies. This is complemented by a top-down corporate risk management model, where senior management identifies major risks with broader impact and suggests mitigation measures. These assessments are regularly reviewed by the Risk Committee, which decides on appropriate follow-up actions.

src_raw: 內部審核處獨立及客觀評估金管局的管治、風險管理及監控程序是否足夠及具成效。該處職能上向外匯基金諮詢委員會轄下的審核委員會匯報，行政上向金管局總裁匯報。內部審核處採用風險為本的方法進行業務運作及資訊系統審核，涵蓋各重大風險範疇。在2022年，該處就金管局的儲備管理、銀行監管工作、貨幣與金融發展、資訊科技及其他機構職能共進行28項審核。審核結果顯示金管局備有足夠及有效的監控措施，以管理金管局運作所產生的風險。
mt_raw: The Internal Audit Department independently and objectively assesses whether the HKMA’s governance, risk management, and monitoring processes are adequate and effective. It reports functionally to the Audit Committee under the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee and administratively to the Chief Executive of the HKMA. The Department adopts a risk-based approach to audit business operations and information systems, covering all major risk areas. In 2022, it conducted 28 audits on the HKMA’s reserve management, banking supervision, monetary and financial development, information technology, and other institutional functions. The audit results confirmed that the HKMA has adequate and effective monitoring measures to manage risks arising from its operations.

- 了解不同類別金融資產及金融負債的估值程序，包括相關監控措施；
- 評價及測試監控措施，包括電腦系統的相關應用程式監控措施；
- 就金融資產及金融負債的估值、存在、權利與責任及完整性取得函證；

- 若所用估值方法的參數並非以可觀察市場數據為基礎，評價估值方法是否適合，以及有關假設與參數是否合理。

src_raw: 集團的投資物業按公平值列帳，於2022年12月31日共值233.94億港元。集團亦於4間聯營公司及22間合營公司擁有權益，該等公司主要業務為持有海外投資物業，有關權益共值396.31億港元。不論是由集團直接持有或由聯營公司或合營公司持有，該等投資物業的公平值均主要根據獨立專業估值師的估值釐定。該等估值涉及重大判斷及估計，包括所用的估值方法及假設。
mt_raw: The Group’s investment properties were measured at fair value and totalled HK$23,394 million as at 31 December 2022. The Group also held interests in four associates and 22 joint ventures whose principal activities were holding overseas investment properties, with a total value of HK$39,631 million. Regardless of whether they were held directly by the Group or by associates or joint ventures, the fair values of these investment properties were primarily determined based on valuations by independent professional valuers. These valuations involved significant judgement and estimation, including the valuation techniques and assumptions used.

mt_raw:
The audit procedures performed in relation to the valuation of investment properties measured at fair value included:
- Obtaining and reviewing valuation reports for investment properties held directly by the Group or by associates or joint ventures, and verifying that the fair values were determined based on the valuations stated in those reports;
- Assessing the independence and qualifications of the valuers; and
- Evaluating whether the valuation techniques were appropriate and whether the assumptions and inputs used were reasonable.

terms: {'審計師報告': 'auditor’s report', '審計署': 'Audit Commission'}
src_raw: 我的目標是就整體財務報表是否不存有任何因欺詐或錯誤而導致的重大錯誤陳述取得合理保證，並發出包括我意見的審計師報告。合理保證是高水平的保證，但不能確保按審計署審計準則進行的審計定能發現所存有的任何重大錯誤陳述。錯誤陳述可以由欺詐或錯誤引起，如果合理預期它們個別或滙總起來可能影響財務報表使用者所作出的經濟決定，則會被視作重大錯誤陳述。
mt_raw: My objective is to obtain reasonable assurance about whether the financial statements as a whole are free from material misstatement, whether due to fraud or error, and to issue an auditor’s report that includes my opinion. Reasonable assurance is a high level of assurance, but is not a guarantee that an audit conducted in accordance with the auditing standards of the Audit Commission will always detect a material misstatement when it exists. Misstatements can arise from fraud or error and are considered material if, individually or in the aggregate, they could reasonably be expected to influence the economic decisions of users taken on the basis of these financial statements.

src_raw:
在根據審計署審計準則進行審計的過程中，我會運用專業判斷並秉持專業懷疑態度。我亦會：
- 識別和評估因欺詐或錯誤而導致財務報表存有重大錯誤陳述的風險；設計及執行審計程序以應對這些風險；以及取得充足和適當的審計憑證，作為我意見的基礎。由於欺詐可能涉及串謀、偽造、蓄意遺漏、虛假陳述，或凌駕內部控制的情況，因此未能發現因欺詐而導致重大錯誤陳述的風險，較未能發現因錯誤而導致者為高；
- 了解與審計相關的內部控制，以設計適當的審計程序。然而，此舉並非旨在對集團內部控制的有效性發表意見；
- 評價金融管理專員所採用的會計政策是否恰當，以及其作出的會計估計和相關資料披露是否合理；
- 判定金融管理專員以持續經營作為會計基礎的做法是否恰當，並根據所得的審計憑證，判定是否存在與事件或情況有關，而且可能對集團持續經營的能力構成重大疑慮的重大不確定性。如果我認為存在重大不確定性，則有必要在審計師報告中請使用者留意財務報表中的相關資料披露。假若所披露的相關資料不足，我便須發出非無保留意見的審計師報告。我的結論是基於截至審計師報告日止所取得的審計憑證。然而，未來事件或情況可能導致集團不能繼續持續經營；
- 評價財務報表的整體列報方式、結構和內容，包括披露資料，以及財務報表是否中肯反映交易和事項；及
- 就集團中實體或業務活動的財務資料獲取充足和適當的審計憑證，以對財務報表發表意見。我負責指導、監督和執行集團審計。我對我的審計意見承擔全部責任。
mt_raw:
As part of an audit in conformity with the auditing standards of the Audit Commission, I exercise professional judgment and maintain professional scepticism throughout the audit. I also:
- Identify and assess the risks of material misstatement of the financial statements, whether due to fraud or error, design and perform audit procedures responsive to those risks, and obtain audit evidence that is sufficient and appropriate to provide a basis for my opinion. The risk of not detecting a material misstatement resulting from fraud is higher than for one resulting from error, as fraud may involve collusion, forgery, intentional omissions, misrepresentations, or the override of internal control.
- Obtain an understanding of internal control relevant to the audit in order to design audit procedures that are appropriate in the circumstances. However, this is not for the purpose of expressing an opinion on the effectiveness of the Group’s internal control.
- Evaluate the appropriateness of accounting policies used by the Financial Commissioner and the reasonableness of accounting estimates and related disclosures made by the Financial Commissioner.
- Conclude on the appropriateness of the Financial Commissioner’s use of the going concern basis of accounting and, based on the audit evidence obtained, whether a material uncertainty exists related to events or conditions that may cast significant doubt on the Group’s ability to continue as a going concern. If I conclude that a material uncertainty exists, I am required to draw attention in my auditor’s report to the related disclosures in the financial statements or, if such disclosures are inadequate, to modify my opinion. My conclusions are based on the audit evidence obtained up to the date of my auditor’s report. However, future events or conditions may cause the Group to cease to continue as a going concern.
- Evaluate the overall presentation, structure and content of the financial statements, including the disclosures, and whether the financial statements represent the underlying transactions and events in a manner that achieves fair presentation.
- Obtain sufficient and appropriate audit evidence regarding the financial information of the entities or business activities within the Group to express an opinion on the financial statements. I am responsible for the direction, supervision and performance of the Group audit. I bear full responsibility for my audit opinion.

src_raw: 從與外匯基金諮詢委員會轄下的審核委員會溝通的事項中，我會決定哪些事項對本期財務報表的審計最為重要，因而構成關鍵審計事項。我會在審計師報告中描述這些事項，除非法律法規不允許對某件事項作出公開披露，或在極端罕見的情況下，因為有合理預期在我報告中溝通某事項而造成的負面後果將會超過其產生的公眾利益而我決定不應在報告中溝通該事項。
mt_raw: From the matters communicated with the Audit Committee under the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee, I determine those matters that were of most significance in the audit of the financial statements for the current period and are therefore the key audit matters. I describe these matters in my auditor’s report unless law or regulation precludes public disclosure about the matter or, in extremely rare circumstances, I determine that a matter should not be communicated in my report because the adverse consequences of doing so would reasonably be expected to outweigh the public interest benefits of such communication.
